headline: Charles Schwab Acquisition Of Forge Opens New Path To Private Markets
summary: Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) has completed its acquisition of Forge Global Holdings. The deal brings Forge’s private market platform into Schwab’s ecosystem. Schwab plans to offer broader access to pre-IPO and other private company shares for its retail clients and advisors. For you as an investor, this move means one of the largest US retail brokerage platforms is now building a bridge to private markets that were historically limited to institutions and ultra high net worth clients.
